top3.sql:
SELECT 
    s.businessentityid,
    strftime('%Y', soh.orderdate) AS year,
    SUM(soh.totaldue) AS total_sales,
    s.salesquota AS annual_quota,
    SUM(soh.totaldue) - s.salesquota AS sales_vs_quota_diff
FROM salesperson s
JOIN salesorderheader soh ON s.businessentityid = soh.salespersonid
GROUP BY s.businessentityid, strftime('%Y', soh.orderdate), s.salesquota
ORDER BY s.businessentityid, year;

SELECT 
    s.businessentityid AS salesperson_id,
    strftime('%Y', so.orderdate) AS year,
    SUM(so.totaldue) AS total_sales,
    s.salesquota AS annual_quota,
    SUM(so.totaldue) - s.salesquota AS sales_vs_quota_diff
FROM salesperson s
JOIN salesorderheader so ON s.businessentityid = so.salespersonid
GROUP BY s.businessentityid, strftime('%Y', so.orderdate)
ORDER BY s.businessentityid, year;

SELECT 
    s.businessentityid,
    strftime('%Y', soh.orderdate) AS year,
    SUM(soh.totaldue) AS total_sales,
    s.salesquota AS annual_quota,
    SUM(soh.totaldue) - s.salesquota AS sales_vs_quota_diff
FROM salesperson s
JOIN salesorderheader soh ON s.businessentityid = soh.salespersonid
GROUP BY s.businessentityid, strftime('%Y', soh.orderdate), s.salesquota
ORDER BY s.businessentityid, year;

SELECT 
    s.businessentityid AS salesperson_id,
    CAST(strftime('%Y', so.orderdate) AS INTEGER) AS year,
    SUM(so.totaldue) AS total_sales,
    s.salesquota AS annual_quota,
    ROUND(SUM(so.totaldue) - s.salesquota, 2) AS sales_vs_quota_diff
FROM salesperson s
INNER JOIN salesorderheader so ON s.businessentityid = so.salespersonid
WHERE so.orderdate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY s.businessentityid, strftime('%Y', so.orderdate)
HAVING s.salesquota IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY s.businessentityid, year;

    s.businessentityid,
    CAST(strftime('%Y', soh.orderdate) AS INTEGER) AS year,
    SUM(soh.totaldue) AS total_sales,
    s.salesquota AS annual_quota,

GROUP BY s.businessentityid, CAST(strftime('%Y', soh.orderdate) AS INTEGER), s.salesquota
ORDER BY s.businessentityid, year;

JOIN salesorderheader soh ON s.businessentityid = soh.salespersonid
GROUP BY s.businessentityid, strftime('%Y', soh.orderdate), s.salesquota
ORDER BY s.businessentityid, year;

    s.businessentityid AS salesperson_id,
    CAST(strftime('%Y', so.orderdate) AS INTEGER) AS year,
    SUM(so.totaldue) AS total_sales,
    s.salesquota AS annual_quota,
    ROUND(SUM(so.totaldue) - s.salesquota, 2) AS sales_vs_quota_diff
FROM salesperson s
INNER JOIN salesorderheader so ON s.businessentityid = so.salespersonid
WHERE so.orderdate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY s.businessentityid, strftime('%Y', so.orderdate)
HAVING s.salesquota IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY s.businessentityid, year;

SELECT 
    s.businessentityid,
    CAST(strftime('%Y', soh.orderdate) AS INTEGER) AS year,
    ROUND(SUM(soh.totaldue), 2) AS total_sales,
    ROUND(s.salesquota, 2) AS annual_quota,
    ROUND(SUM(soh.totaldue) - s.salesquota, 2) AS sales_vs_quota_diff
FROM salesperson s
INNER JOIN salesorderheader soh 
    ON s.businessentityid = soh.salespersonid
    AND soh.orderdate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY s.businessentityid, CAST(strftime('%Y', soh.orderdate) AS INTEGER), s.salesquota

final.sql:
SELECT 
    s.businessentityid,
    strftime('%Y', soh.orderdate) AS year,
    SUM(soh.totaldue) AS total_sales,
    s.salesquota AS annual_quota,
    SUM(soh.totaldue) - s.salesquota AS sales_vs_quota_diff
FROM salesperson s
JOIN salesorderheader soh ON s.businessentityid = soh.salespersonid
GROUP BY s.businessentityid, strftime('%Y', soh.orderdate), s.salesquota
ORDER BY s.businessentityid, year;
